chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-550 of 2021 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.10.2025. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G., along with Muhammad Saleem Tanwri, XEN Rice Canal Division, Larkana. ------------------------ Statement has been filed by the respondent No.1, which is taken on record. No one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that the prayer clause (a) regarding the harassment has already been decided vide order dated 17.10.2023; however, the prayer clause (b) regarding the due share of the irrigation water for the petitioner’s land, XEN Rice Canal Division, Larkana present submits that the water for irrigating the petitioner’s land has been provided under the command of Watercourse No.WC8L of Raj Wah Distry of Kamber Sub-Division. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, it seems that the grievance of the petition as raised in prayer clause (b) has been redressed. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE
